sql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT e1.user_pseudo_id) AS distinct_users_with_positive_engagement
FROM bigquery-public-data.ga4_obfuscated_sample_ecommerce.events_20210109 e1
LEFT JOIN bigquery-public-data.ga4_obfuscated_sample_ecommerce.events_20201107 e2
ON e1.user_pseudo_id = e2.user_pseudo_id
WHERE e1.event_timestamp >= UNIX_SECONDS('2021-01-01 00:00:00')
AND e1.event_timestamp < UNIX_SECONDS('2021-01-08 00:00:00')
AND e2.event_timestamp IS NULL;

SELECT SUM(hits.product.productRevenue) AS Total_Revenue, hits.product.v2ProductName
FROM `bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
CROSS JOIN UNNEST(hits) AS hits
WHERE (_TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170701' AND '20170731') AND (ARRAY_CONTAINS(hits.product, STRUCT('Youtube Men\'s Vintage Henley' AS v2ProductName))) AND (hits.product.v2ProductName != 'Youtube Men\'s Vintage Henley')
GROUP BY hits.product.v2ProductName
ORDER BY SUM(hits.product.productRevenue) DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT SUM(totals.transactionRevenue) AS total_transaction_revenue
FROM `bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
WHERE (_TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170101' AND '20171231') AND (_TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170101' AND '20171231')
GROUP BY _TABLE_SUFFIX
ORDER BY SUM(totals.transactionRevenue) DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT DATE_DIFF(MIN(CAST(_TABLE_SUFFIX AS DATE)), MIN(CAST(_TABLE_SUFFIX AS DATE)), DAY) AS days_elapsed, totals.transactions, totals.transactionRevenue, totals.timeOnSite, totals.bounces, totals.visits, totals.hits, totals.pageviews, totals.newVisits, totals.screenviews, totals.uniqueScreenviews, totals.timeOnScreen, totals.totalTransactionRevenue, totals.sessionQualityDim
FROM `bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
WHERE (_TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170201' AND '20170228') AND (totals.transactions > 0 AND _TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170201' AND '20170228')
GROUP BY user_id, totals.transactions, totals.transactionRevenue, totals.timeOnSite, totals.bounces, totals.visits, totals.hits, totals.pageviews, totals.newVisits, totals.screenviews, totals.uniqueScreenviews, totals.timeOnScreen, totals.totalTransactionRevenue, totals.sessionQualityDim

SELECT SUM(hits.product.productRevenue) AS Total_Product_Revenue, MAX(SUM(hits.product.productRevenue)) OVER (PARTITION BY DATE(_TABLE_SUFFIX)) AS Max_Daily_Product_Revenue, MAX(SUM(hits.product.productRevenue)) OVER (PARTITION BY EXTRACT(WEEK FROM DATE(_TABLE_SUFFIX))) AS Max_Weekly_Product_Revenue, MAX(SUM(hits.product.productRevenue)) OVER (PARTITION BY EXTRACT(MONTH FROM DATE(_TABLE_SUFFIX))) AS Max_Monthly_Product_Revenue, hits.page.pagePath, hits.sourcePropertyInfo.sourcePropertyDisplayName
FROM `bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
CROSS JOIN UNNEST(hits) AS hits
WHERE (_TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170101' AND '20170630') AND (_TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170101' AND '20170630')
GROUP BY hits.sourcePropertyInfo.sourcePropertyDisplayName, hits.page.pagePath
ORDER BY SUM(hits.product.productRevenue) DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT AVG(totals.pageviews) AS avg_pageviews_per_visitor, _TABLE_SUFFIX, totals.hits, totals.transactions
FROM `bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
WHERE (_TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170401' AND '20170731') AND (_TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170401' AND '20170731')
GROUP BY CASE WHEN totals.transactions >= 1 THEN 'purchase' ELSE 'non-purchase' END, _TABLE_SUFFIX, totals.hits, totals.transactions
ORDER BY _TABLE_SUFFIX ASC

SELECT SUM(hits.product.productQuantity) AS total_quantity, hits.product.v2ProductName
FROM `bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
CROSS JOIN UNNEST(hits) AS hits
WHERE (_TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170701' AND '20170731') AND (hits.product.v2ProductName IS NOT NULL AND hits.product.v2ProductName != '' AND LOWER(hits.product.v2ProductName) LIKE '%youtube%' AND LOWER(hits.product.v2ProductName) NOT LIKE '%youtube%') AND (hits.product.productQuantity IS NOT NULL)
GROUP BY hits.product.v2ProductName
ORDER BY SUM(hits.product.productQuantity) DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT hits.page.pagePath AS next_page, MAX(hits.time) OVER (PARTITION BY hits.page.pagePath) AS max_time_on_home, hits.page.pageTitle, hits.eventInfo.eventLabel
FROM `bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
CROSS JOIN UNNEST(hits) AS hits
WHERE (_TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170101' AND '20170131') AND (hits.eventInfo.eventLabel LIKE '%Data Share%') AND (hits.page.pagePath LIKE '/home%')
GROUP BY hits.page.pagePath, hits.page.pageTitle, hits.eventInfo.eventLabel
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1

WITH PurchaseSessions AS (
    SELECT 
        visitorId,
        COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN transaction_id IS NOT NULL THEN 1 END) AS num_purchases
    FROM 
        bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_20170604
    WHERE 
        date BETWEEN '2017-06-01' AND '2017-07-31'
    GROUP BY 
        visitorId
),
PageviewData AS (
    SELECT 
        visitorId,
        SUM(pageviews) AS total_pageviews,
        CASE 
            WHEN num_purchases > 0 THEN 'purchase'
            ELSE 'non_purchase'
        END AS purchase_status
    FROM 
        bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_20170604
    JOIN 
        PurchaseSessions ON bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_20170604.visitorId = PurchaseSessions.visitorId
    WHERE 
        date BETWEEN '2017-06-01' AND '2017-07-31'
    GROUP BY 
        visitorId, purchase_status
)
SELECT 
    DATE_TRUNC(date, MONTH) AS month,
    AVG(CASE WHEN purchase_status = 'purchase' THEN total_pageviews ELSE NULL END) AS avg_purchase_pageviews,
    AVG(CASE WHEN purchase_status = 'non_purchase' THEN total_pageviews ELSE NULL END) AS avg_non_purchase_pageviews
FROM 
    PageviewData
GROUP BY 
    month;

SELECT MAX(TIMESTAMP_DIFF(MAX(_PARTITIONTIME), MIN(_PARTITIONTIME), DAY)) AS max_days_diff, device.isMobile
FROM `bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
WHERE (_TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20160901' AND '20170731') AND (device.isMobile = TRUE)
GROUP BY fullVisitorId, device.isMobile

SELECT 100 * SUM(CASE WHEN totals.hits > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) / NULLIF(SUM(totals.pageviews), 0) AS Add_to_Cart_Conversion_Rate, 100 * SUM(totals.transactions) / NULLIF(SUM(totals.pageviews), 0) AS Purchase_Conversion_Rate
FROM `bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
WHERE (_TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170101' AND '20170331') AND (_TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20170101' AND '20170331')

SELECT device.isMobile
FROM `bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
WHERE (_TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20160901' AND '20171231') AND (device.isMobile = TRUE)
GROUP BY fullVisitorId

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN totals.newVisits > 0 AND totals.timeOnSite > 300 AND totals.transactions > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS new_users_with_long_stay_and_purchase, SUM(CASE WHEN totals.newVisits > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS total_new_users
FROM `bigquery-public-data.google_analytics_sample.ga_sessions_*`
WHERE (_TABLE_SUFFIX BETWEEN '20160801' AND '20170430') AND (totals.newVisits IS NOT NULL)

SELECT SUM(total_discharges) AS total_discharges, SUM(total_discharges * average_total_payments) / SUM(total_discharges) AS weighted_average_total_payments, drg_definition, provider_city
FROM `bigquery-public-data.cms_medicare.inpatient_charges_2014`
GROUP BY drg_definition, provider_city
ORDER BY SUM(total_discharges) DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_prescriptions, nppes_provider_state, drug_name
FROM `bigquery-public-data.cms_medicare.part_d_prescriber_2014`
GROUP BY nppes_provider_state, drug_name
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC

SELECT COALESCE(outpatient_charges_2014.average_total_payments, 0) + COALESCE(inpatient_charges_2014.average_covered_charges, 0) AS combined_average_costs, provider_name
FROM `bigquery-public-data.cms_medicare.outpatient_charges_2014`
GROUP BY provider_name
ORDER BY combined_average_costs DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT SUM(total_claim_count) AS total_claim_count, SUM(total_drug_cost) AS total_drug_cost, drug_name
FROM `bigquery-public-data.cms_medicare.part_d_prescriber_2014`
GROUP BY drug_name
ORDER BY SUM(total_claim_count) DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT SUM(average_medicare_payments * total_discharges) AS total_inpatient_cost, average_medicare_payments * total_discharges AS yearly_inpatient_cost, average_total_payments * total_discharges AS yearly_outpatient_cost
FROM `bigquery-public-data.cms_medicare.inpatient_charges_2011`
WHERE (2011-01-01) AND (2015-12-31)
GROUP BY _TABLE_SUFFIX
ORDER BY total_inpatient_cost DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) * 100.0 / (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bigquery-public-data.cms_codes.icd10_diagnoses_2019) AS participant_percentage, cm_code, short_description, long_description
FROM `bigquery-public-data.cms_codes.icd10_diagnoses_2019`
WHERE (STARTS_WITH(cm_code, 'L70') OR STARTS_WITH(cm_code, 'L20') OR STARTS_WITH(cm_code, 'L40') OR STARTS_WITH(cm_code, 'L80'))
GROUP BY cm_code, short_description, long_description
ORDER BY cm_code ASC

SELECT 100 * (COUNT(*) - COUNT(CASE WHEN concept_ancestor.min_levels_of_separation = 0 THEN 1 END)) / COUNT(*) AS percentage_not_using_quinapril, year_of_birth, month_of_birth, day_of_birth, max_levels_of_separation
FROM `bigquery-public-data.cms_synthetic_patient_data_omop.person`
WHERE (concept_ancestor.max_levels_of_separation >= 0)
GROUP BY year_of_birth, month_of_birth, day_of_birth, max_levels_of_separation

SELECT latitude
FROM `bigquery-public-data.noaa_hurricanes.hurricanes`

SELECT SUM(distance_from_source) AS total_travel_distance
FROM `bigquery-public-data.noaa_tsunami.historical_runups`
WHERE (TRUE)
GROUP BY distance_from_source
ORDER BY total_travel_distance DESC
LIMIT 3

SELECT COUNT(*) AS event_count, state
FROM `bigquery-public-data.noaa_historic_severe_storms.storms_1980`
GROUP BY state
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT COUNT(*) AS valid_days_count, gsod2019.stn, gsod2019.wban, gsod2019.temp, gsod2019.max, gsod2019.min, stations.begin, stations.end
FROM `bigquery-public-data.noaa_gsod.gsod2019`
WHERE (gsod2019.temp IS NOT NULL AND gsod2019.max IS NOT NULL AND gsod2019.min IS NOT NULL) AND (stations.begin <= '2000-01-01') AND (stations.end >= '2019-06-30') AND (2019-01-01) AND (2019-12-31)
GROUP BY gsod2019.stn, gsod2019.wban, gsod2019.temp, gsod2019.max, gsod2019.min, stations.begin, stations.end

SELECT AVG(air_temperature) AS avg_air_temperature, AVG(wind_speed) AS avg_wind_speed, AVG(dewpoint_temperature) AS avg_dewpoint_temperature
FROM `bigquery-public-data.noaa_icoads.icoads_core_2011`
WHERE (_TABLE_SUFFIX IN ('2011', '2013', '2015')) AND (DATE('2011-06-12')) AND (DATE('2015-06-12'))
GROUP BY _TABLE_SUFFIX

SELECT SUM(ABS(air_temperature - wetbulb_temperature) + ABS(air_temperature - dewpoint_temperature) + ABS(air_temperature - sea_surface_temp)) AS sum_of_differences
FROM `bigquery-public-data.noaa_icoads.icoads_core_2010`
GROUP BY _TABLE_SUFFIX
ORDER BY SUM(ABS(air_temperature - wetbulb_temperature) + ABS(air_temperature - dewpoint_temperature) + ABS(air_temperature - sea_surface_temp)) ASC
LIMIT 3

SELECT AVG(wind_speed) AS avg_wind_speed, latitude, longitude
FROM `bigquery-public-data.noaa_icoads.icoads_core_2005`
WHERE (wind_speed IS NOT NULL)
GROUP BY latitude, longitude
ORDER BY AVG(wind_speed) DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT 100.0 * COUNT(DISTINCT CASE WHEN valid_days >= 0.9 * total_days THEN stn END) / COUNT(DISTINCT stn) AS percentage_valid_stations, usaf, wban, date, wdsp, mxpsd, fog
FROM `bigquery-public-data.noaa_gsod.stations`
WHERE (usaf != '999999') AND (wdsp IS NOT NULL AND wdsp != '9999.9' AND mxpsd IS NOT NULL AND mxpsd != '9999.9' AND fog IS NOT NULL AND fog != '9999.9') AND (date >= '2022-01-01') AND (date <= '2022-12-31')
GROUP BY stn, usaf, wban, date, wdsp, mxpsd, fog

SELECT COUNT(*) AS rainy_days_2023, stations.usaf, stations.wban, stations.state, gsod2023.date, gsod2023.stn, gsod2023.wban, gsod2023.visib
FROM `bigquery-public-data.noaa_gsod.stations`
WHERE (stations.state = 'WA') AND (gsod2023.visib IS NOT NULL AND gsod2023.visib != '99.99' AND CAST(gsod2023.visib AS FLOAT64) > 0) AND (gsod2023.date >= '2023-01-01') AND (gsod2023.date <= '2023-12-31')
GROUP BY stations.usaf, stations.wban, stations.state, gsod2023.date, gsod2023.stn, gsod2023.wban, gsod2023.visib

SELECT MAX(air_temperature) AS max_temperature, MIN(air_temperature) AS min_temperature, AVG(air_temperature) AS avg_temperature, wetbulb_temperature, dewpoint_temperature, day
FROM `bigquery-public-data.noaa_icoads.icoads_core_2008`
WHERE (day >= 1 AND day <= 31) AND (air_temperature IS NOT NULL AND air_temperature != 0) AND (2023-10-01) AND (2023-10-31)
GROUP BY day, wetbulb_temperature, dewpoint_temperature
ORDER BY day ASC

WITH combined_data AS (
    SELECT '2006' AS year, * FROM bigquery-public-data.noaa_icoads.icoads_core_2006
    UNION ALL
    SELECT '2007' AS year, * FROM bigquery-public-data.noaa_icoads.icoads_core_2007
    UNION ALL
    SELECT '2008' AS year, * FROM bigquery-public-data.noaa_icoads.icoads_core_2008
    UNION ALL
    SELECT '2012' AS year, * FROM bigquery-public-data.noaa_icoads.icoads_core_2012
    UNION ALL
    SELECT '2013' AS year, * FROM bigquery-public-data.noaa_icoads.icoads_core_2013
    UNION ALL
    SELECT '2014' AS year, * FROM bigquery-public-data.noaa_icoads.icoads_core_2014
    UNION ALL
    SELECT '2015' AS year, * FROM bigquery-public-data.noaa_icoads.icoads_core_2015
    UNION ALL
    SELECT '2017' AS year, * FROM bigquery-public-data.noaa_icoads.icoads_core_2017
),
filtered_data AS (
    SELECT 
        DATE_ADD(CAST(year || '-' || LPAD(day, 3, '0') AS STRING), INTERVAL -1 DAY) AS date,
        AVG(indicator_for_temp) AS avg_temperature,
        AVG(wind_speed) AS avg_wind_speed,
        AVG(wind_speed_indicator) AS avg_wind_speed_indicator
    FROM combined_data
    WHERE day BETWEEN 1 AND 90 -- January 1 to March 31, 2019
    GROUP BY date
),
moving_averages AS (
    SELECT 
        date,
        ROUND(AVG(avg_temperature) OVER (ORDER BY date ROWS BETWEEN 7 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW), 1) AS ma_temperature,
        ROUND(AVG(avg_wind_speed) OVER (ORDER BY date ROWS BETWEEN 7 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW), 1) AS ma_wind_speed,
        ROUND(AVG(avg_wind_speed_indicator) OVER (ORDER BY date ROWS BETWEEN 7 PRECEDING AND CURRENT ROW), 1) AS ma_wind_speed_indicator
    FROM filtered_data
)
SELECT 
    date,
    ma_temperature,
    ma_wind_speed,
    ma_wind_speed_indicator,
    ROUND(ma_temperature - LAG(ma_temperature, 1) OVER (ORDER BY date), 1) AS diff_ma_temperature_1,
    ROUND(ma_temperature - LAG(ma_temperature, 2) OVER (ORDER BY date), 1) AS diff_ma_temperature_2,
    ROUND(ma_temperature - LAG(ma_temperature, 3) OVER (ORDER BY date), 1) AS diff_ma_temperature_3,
    ROUND(ma_temperature - LAG(ma_temperature, 4) OVER (ORDER BY date), 1) AS diff_ma_temperature_4,
    ROUND(ma_temperature - LAG(ma_temperature, 5) OVER (ORDER BY date), 1) AS diff_ma_temperature_5,
    ROUND(ma_temperature - LAG(ma_temperature, 6) OVER (ORDER BY date), 1) AS diff_ma_temperature_6,
    ROUND(ma_temperature - LAG(ma_temperature, 7) OVER (ORDER BY date), 1) AS diff_ma_temperature_7,
    ROUND(ma_temperature - LAG(ma_temperature, 8) OVER (ORDER BY date), 1) AS diff_ma_temperature_8,
    ROUND(ma_wind_speed - LAG(ma_wind_speed, 1) OVER (ORDER BY date), 1) AS diff_ma_wind_speed_1,
    ROUND(ma_wind_speed - LAG(ma_wind_speed, 2) OVER (ORDER BY date), 1) AS diff_ma_wind_speed_2,
    ROUND(ma_wind_speed - LAG(ma_wind_speed, 3) OVER (ORDER BY date), 1) AS diff_ma_wind_speed_3,
    ROUND(ma_wind_speed - LAG(ma

SELECT AVG(temp) AS avg_temp, stn, year, mo, da
FROM `bigquery-public-data.noaa_gsod.gsod2009`
WHERE (stn = '723758') AND (year = '2009') AND (mo = '10')
GROUP BY year, mo, da, stn
ORDER BY AVG(temp) DESC
LIMIT 3

SELECT COUNT(*) AS count_of_valid_temperature_observations, latitude, longitude
FROM `bigquery-public-data.new_york.citibike_stations`
WHERE (ST_DWITHIN(ST_GEOGPOINT(longitude, latitude), ST_GEOGPOINT(-73.764, 41.197), 20 * 1609.34)) AND (2011-01-01) AND (2020-12-31)
GROUP BY latitude, longitude

SELECT SUM(number_of_cyclist_injured + number_of_cyclist_killed + number_of_motorist_injured + number_of_motorist_killed + number_of_pedestrians_injured + number_of_pedestrians_killed + number_of_persons_injured + number_of_persons_killed) AS total_complaints, COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(timestamp)) AS total_days_with_valid_temp, CORR(temperature, SUM(number_of_cyclist_injured + number_of_cyclist_killed + number_of_motorist_injured + number_of_motorist_killed + number_of_pedestrians_injured + number_of_pedestrians_killed + number_of_persons_injured + number_of_persons_killed)) AS correlation_temp_complaints, CORR(temperature, (SUM(number_of_cyclist_injured + number_of_cyclist_killed + number_of_motorist_injured + number_of_motorist_killed + number_of_pedestrians_injured + number_of_pedestrians_killed + number_of_persons_injured + number_of_persons_killed) / SUM(SUM(number_of_cyclist_injured + number_of_cyclist_killed + number_of_motorist_injured + number_of_motorist_killed + number_of_pedestrians_injured + number_of_pedestrians_killed + number_of_persons_injured + number_of_persons_killed)) OVER()) * 100) AS correlation_temp_percentage
FROM `bigquery-public-data.new_york.nypd_mv_collisions`
WHERE (station IN ('725030', '744860') AND temperature != 9999.9) AND (DATE >= '2008-01-01' AND DATE <= '2017-12-31')
GROUP BY station, DATE(timestamp)
ORDER BY total_complaints DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_requests, complaint_type, created_date
FROM `bigquery-public-data.new_york.311_service_requests`
WHERE (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM created_date) BETWEEN 2011 AND 2020) AND (created_date >= '2011-01-01') AND (created_date < '2021-01-01')
GROUP BY complaint_type, created_date

SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_trips, pickup_datetime, pickup_latitude, pickup_longitude
FROM `bigquery-public-data.new_york.tlc_yellow_trips_2015`
WHERE (pickup_latitude IS NOT NULL AND pickup_longitude IS NOT NULL) AND (pickup_datetime >= '2015-01-01' AND pickup_datetime < '2015-01-02')
GROUP BY EXTRACT(HOUR FROM pickup_datetime), pickup_datetime, pickup_latitude, pickup_longitude
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT id, name, latitude, longitude
FROM `bigquery-public-data.ghcn_d.ghcnd_stations`
WHERE (ABS(latitude - 41.8319) <= 0.45 AND ABS(longitude - (-87.6847)) <= 0.45)

SELECT MAX(value) AS highest_precipitation, MIN(value) AS minimum_temperature, MAX(value) AS maximum_temperature
FROM `bigquery-public-data.ghcn_d.ghcnd_2013`
WHERE (value IS NOT NULL)

SELECT COUNT(*) / COUNT(DISTINCT DATE(starttime)) AS avg_daily_trips, tripduration
FROM `bigquery-public-data.new_york.citibike_trips`
WHERE (DATE(starttime) BETWEEN '2016-01-01' AND '2016-12-31') AND (DATE(starttime) BETWEEN '2016-01-01' AND '2016-12-31')
GROUP BY CASE WHEN precipitation > 50 THEN 'rainy' ELSE 'non_rainy' END, tripduration

WITH GroupRides AS (
    SELECT 
        end_station_name,
        COUNT(*) AS group_trip_count
    FROM 
        bigquery-public-data.new_york.citibike_trips
    WHERE 
        start_station_name = end_station_name
        AND TIMESTAMP_DIFF(endtime, starttime, MINUTE) <= 2
    GROUP BY 
        end_station_name
),
TotalTrips AS (
    SELECT 
        end_station_name,
        COUNT(*) AS total_trip_count
    FROM 
        bigquery-public-data.new_york.citibike_trips
    GROUP BY 
        end_station_name
)
SELECT 
    gr.end_station_name,
    gr.group_trip_count,
    tt.total_trip_count,
    (gr.group_trip_count / tt.total_trip_count) AS group_proportion
FROM 
    GroupRides gr
JOIN 
    TotalTrips tt ON gr.end_station_name = tt.end_station_name
ORDER BY 
    group_proportion DESC
LIMIT 10;

WITH 
    trees_1995 AS (
        SELECT 
            UPPER(ts.species_scientific_name) AS species,
            COUNT(*) AS count_1995
        FROM 
            bigquery-public-data.new_york.tree_census_1995 tc
        JOIN 
            bigquery-public-data.new_york.tree_species ts ON UPPER(tc.species) = UPPER(ts.species_common_name)
        WHERE 
            tc.status != 'Dead'
        GROUP BY 
            ts.species_scientific_name
    ),
    trees_2015 AS (
        SELECT 
            UPPER(ts.species_scientific_name) AS species,
            COUNT(*) AS count_2015
        FROM 
            bigquery-public-data.new_york.tree_census_2015 tc
        JOIN 
            bigquery-public-data.new_york.tree_species ts ON UPPER(tc.spc_latin) = UPPER(ts.species_scientific_name)
        WHERE 
            tc.status = 'Alive'
        GROUP BY 
            ts.species_scientific_name
    )
SELECT 
    ts.fall_color,
    SUM(t2015.count_2015 - t1995.count_1995) AS net_change
FROM 
    trees_1995 t1995
JOIN 
    trees_2015 t2015 ON t1995.species = t2015.species
JOIN 
    bigquery-public-data.new_york.tree_species ts ON t1995.species = UPPER(ts.species_scientific_name)
GROUP BY 
    ts.fall_color;

WITH TreeCounts AS (
    SELECT 
        t.spc_latin,
        t.spc_common,
        COUNT(t.recordid) AS total_trees,
        SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'Alive' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS alive_trees,
        SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'Dead' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS dead_trees
    FROM 
        bigquery-public-data.new_york.tree_census_1995 t
    WHERE 
        t.spc_latin IS NOT NULL AND t.spc_latin != ''
    GROUP BY 
        t.spc_latin, t.spc_common
),
TreeCounts2015 AS (
    SELECT 
        t.spc_latin,
        t.spc_common,
        COUNT(t.tree_id) AS total_trees_2015,
        SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'Alive' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS alive_trees_2015,
        SUM(CASE WHEN t.status = 'Dead' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS dead_trees_2015
    FROM 
        bigquery-public-data.new_york.tree_census_2015 t
    WHERE 
        t.spc_latin IS NOT NULL AND t.spc_latin != ''
    GROUP BY 
        t.spc_latin, t.spc_common
)
SELECT 
    tc.spc_latin,
    tc.spc_common,
    tc.total_trees + COALESCE(tc2015.total_trees_2015, 0) AS total_trees_combined,
    (tc.alive_trees + COALESCE(tc2015.alive_trees_2015, 0)) - tc.alive_trees AS alive_tree_growth,
    (tc.dead_trees + COALESCE(tc2015.dead_trees_2015, 0)) - tc.dead_trees AS dead_tree_growth,
    ABS((tc.total_trees + COALESCE(tc2015.total_trees_2015, 0)) - (tc.alive_trees + COALESCE(tc2015.alive_trees_2015, 0))) - tc.alive_trees AS total_difference
FROM 
    TreeCounts tc
LEFT JOIN 
    TreeCounts2015 tc2015 ON tc.spc_latin = tc2015.spc_latin
ORDER BY 
    total_difference DESC
LIMIT 10;

SELECT AVG(TIMESTAMP_DIFF(dropoff_datetime, pickup_datetime, SECOND)) AS avg_taxi_duration, AVG(TIMESTAMP_DIFF(end_time, start_time, SECOND)) AS avg_bike_duration, start_station_name, end_station_name
FROM `bigquery-public-data.new_york.tlc_yellow_trips_2016`
WHERE (pickup_datetime >= '2016-01-01' AND pickup_datetime < '2017-01-01') AND (pickup_datetime >= '2016-01-01') AND (pickup_datetime < '2017-01-01')
GROUP BY start_station_name, end_station_name
ORDER BY avg_taxi_duration ASC
LIMIT 20

SELECT COUNT(*) AS trip_count, start_station_name, starttime
FROM `bigquery-public-data.new_york_citibike.citibike_trips`
WHERE (EXTRACT(YEAR FROM starttime) = 2018)
GROUP BY start_station_name, starttime
ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT AVG(TIMESTAMP_DIFF(dropoff_datetime, pickup_datetime, MINUTE)) AS avg_trip_duration_minutes, trip_distance, dropoff_location_id, pickup_location_id
FROM `bigquery-public-data.new_york_taxi_trips.tlc_yellow_trips_2016`
WHERE (pickup_datetime >= '2016-02-01' AND pickup_datetime <= '2016-02-07') AND (TIMESTAMP_DIFF(dropoff_datetime, pickup_datetime, MINUTE) > 0) AND (trip_distance >= 10) AND (pickup_datetime >= '2016-02-01') AND (pickup_datetime <= '2016-02-07')
GROUP BY trip_distance, dropoff_location_id, pickup_location_id

SELECT (tip_amount / NULLIF(total_amount, 0)) * 100 AS tip_percentage, CASE WHEN tip_amount = 0 THEN '0%' WHEN (tip_amount / NULLIF(total_amount, 0)) <= 0.05 THEN '0-5%' WHEN (tip_amount / NULLIF(total_amount, 0)) <= 0.1 THEN '5-10%' WHEN (tip_amount / NULLIF(total_amount, 0)) <= 0.15 THEN '10-15%' WHEN (tip_amount / NULLIF(total_amount, 0)) <= 0.2 THEN '15-20%' WHEN (tip_amount / NULLIF(total_amount, 0)) <= 0.25 THEN '20-25%' ELSE '25%+' END AS tip_category, fare_amount, tolls_amount
FROM `bigquery-public-data.new_york_taxi_trips.tlc_yellow_trips_2016`
WHERE (total_amount >= 0 AND tip_amount >= 0 AND fare_amount >= 0 AND tolls_amount >= 0) AND (2016-01-01) AND (2016-01-07)
GROUP BY tip_category

SELECT ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN (tip_amount * 100.0 / NULLIF(total_amount, 0)) = 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) AS no_tip_percentage, fare_amount
FROM `bigquery-public-data.new_york_taxi_trips.tlc_yellow_trips_2016`
WHERE (tip_amount >= 0 AND fare_amount >= 0 AND total_amount >= 0) AND (pickup_datetime >= '2016-01-01') AND (pickup_datetime <= '2016-01-07')
GROUP BY pickup_borough, fare_amount

SELECT TIMESTAMP_DIFF(dropoff_datetime, pickup_datetime, SECOND) AS trip_duration_seconds, trip_distance / (TIMESTAMP_DIFF(dropoff_datetime, pickup_datetime, SECOND) / 3600) AS driving_speed_mph, (tip_amount / total_amount) * 100 AS tip_rate_percentage, fare_amount, tolls_amount
FROM `bigquery-public-data.new_york_taxi_trips.tlc_yellow_trips_2016`
WHERE (pickup_datetime >= '2016-07-01' AND pickup_datetime < '2016-07-08') AND (dropoff_datetime >= '2016-07-01' AND dropoff_datetime < '2016-07-08') AND (passenger_count > 5) AND (trip_distance >= 10) AND (fare_amount >= 0 AND tip_amount >= 0 AND tolls_amount >= 0 AND total_amount >= 0) AND (dropoff_datetime > pickup_datetime) AND (2016-07-01) AND (2016-07-08)
ORDER BY total_amount DESC
LIMIT 10

WITH subway_station_counts AS (
    SELECT 
        s.borough_name,
        COUNT(s.station_id) AS total_stations,
        SUM(CASE WHEN e.entry AND e.ada_compliant THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS accessible_stations
    FROM 
        bigquery-public-data.new_york_subway.stations s
    LEFT JOIN 
        bigquery-public-data.new_york_subway.station_entrances e ON ST_Contains(e.entrance_geom, s.station_geom)
    GROUP BY 
        s.borough_name
),
borough_areas AS (
    SELECT 
        b.borough_name,
        b.borough_area
    FROM 
        bigquery-public-data.new_york_subway.geo_nyc_borough_boundaries b
)
SELECT 
    sc.borough_name,
    sc.total_stations,
    sc.accessible_stations,
    (sc.accessible_stations * 100.0 / sc.total_stations) AS accessible_percentage
FROM 
    subway_station_counts sc
JOIN 
    borough_areas ba ON sc.borough_name = ba.borough_name
ORDER BY 
    accessible_percentage DESC;

SELECT SUM(1000) AS total_distance_meters, bike_number, start_station_id, end_station_id
FROM `bigquery-public-data.san_francisco.bikeshare_trips`
GROUP BY bike_number, start_station_id, end_station_id
ORDER BY total_distance_meters DESC
